variant: give me one fact about creatine

request.message: give me one fact about creatine

response_body.response: creatine increases muscle phosphocreatine stores, which speeds atp regeneration during high-intensity work — meaning more reps and strength per set, especially in the 6-12 rep range. takes about 5-7 days to saturate at 5g daily, and the effect is pretty consistent across studies.

products.name: NOW Sports Creatine Monohydrate Powder (1 lb)
products.description: Pure creatine monohydrate — 5g/day, single most evidence-backed supp.

variant: give me one fact about collagen

request.message: give me one fact about collagen

response_body.response: collagen supplementation (10-20g daily) increases skin elasticity and hydration measurably within 8-12 weeks, particularly for fine lines and firmness — the peptides get absorbed and incorporated into dermal collagen, though the effect is modest compared to sunscreen and sleep.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Relief Sun Rice + Probiotic SPF 50+ PA++++
products.description: Cosmetic-elegant Asian SPF — chemical filters, no white cast.
